summary: Joel Spolsky announces an open house event at Fog Creek Software's newly expanded office space. He invites readers to visit, meet the team and summer interns, and enjoy snacks and wine. The post is a brief, informal invitation with event details including date, time, and address in midtown Manhattan.
key_points: Fog Creek Software completed a major office expansion
The company hosts summer interns as part of its talent pipeline
Joel uses his popular blog as a direct channel to invite the tech community to company events
money_quotes: If you'd like to check it out, meet the Fog Creek team and this year's crop of bright-eyed-and-bushy-tailed summer interns, please come to our open house.
key_insight: Fog Creek leveraged its blog audience and office culture as recruiting and community-building tools, turning a simple office expansion into a public event.
